summary: Added config-first getSecret(key,fallback) (config.json → env → fallback, inverse of env-first getConfig) so the Settings Secrets UI is authoritative over a stale ambient key inherited via the hook respawn. Routed the only user-managed secret consumer (consult_grok XAI_API_KEY @setup.ts:2978) through getSecret; getConfig kept env-first for deploy-time vars. Added 5 getSecret tests incl. the stale-env scenario. tsc 0 errors; config-service tests 12/12.
